summary: Restore structured output for Amplitude read commands that return JSON so `--json`, `--compact`, `--select`, `--csv`, and `--agent` work normally.
reason: The shared OpenAPI success schema includes `application/zip` for the export endpoint, which caused generated JSON endpoints to inherit the binary-response override and reject every structured-output flag. Only `/export` should keep the binary raw-output guard; JSON endpoints should use the standard provenance-aware read output pipeline.
validated_outcome: `go test ./...`, `cli-printing-press publish validate`, `verify-skill`, and `verify-publish-package` pass with regression coverage for every JSON read command under `--agent`.
